- **Type SSOT**: `packages/theme-default/src/lib/folderTree.types.ts` defines `FolderNode { name, path, children, notes }` — exported via the barrel so consumers (steps 4–8) can `import type { FolderNode } from '@noteforge/theme-default'`.
- **Pure function**: `apps/blog/src/lib/folderAggregation.ts` implements `buildFolderTree(NoteEntry[]): FolderNode` with no Astro/FS/privacy access. Alias-redirect entries are silently skipped at runtime as a safety net; slug↔folder collisions are recorded on both sides (throw is step 6's job); sort is folder-name then slug, both case-insensitive with case-sensitive secondary key for stability.
- **TDD**: 13 test cases covering empty/root-note/single-folder/depth-3/6-level/input-order-stability/case-insensitive sort/case-sensitive folder distinction/draft-pass-through/alias-skip/slug-collision/title-fallback.
- **AC**: typecheck ✓, lint ✓, 528/528 tests ✓, blog build ✓, canary occurrences in `dist/` = 0.
